title: Candy Cane Fun
description: Turns sugar cane and bamboo objects into candy canes!
body:
This pack makes sugar cane and bamboo look like candy canes! Many blocks are variations of stripes, or unique holiday designs. I tried to add some variety as you can see from the gallery. Only item not edited is the bamboo raft/boat. ~~If you wish to have the Christmas Elves as well, I am adding another pack that combines them. *See "Holiday Whimsy"

I hope you enjoy :D I love it 
~~Randihope
